query: /harness-master compare filesystem-mcp github-mcp memory-mcp for codex opencode
expected_behavior: Agent enters Candidate Compare mode and ranks candidates for Codex and OpenCode
Agent compares Official MCP Registry, Glama, PulseMCP, Smithery, Docker MCP Catalog, package, local registry, and security evidence
Agent reviews one-owner-per-MCP rules, credential exposure, sandboxing, validation readiness, and rollback
Agent does not recommend adoption from a single registry alone when stronger corroboration is available
